title: Mobcraft TCG Resource Pack
description: Collect trading cards that drop from mobs when you kill them. Just like mob heads, but with cards!
body:
## **ABOUT**
Resource Pack for the [Mobcraft TCG](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mobcraft-tcg) Datapack. You can also use this texture pack without the datapack but you can only use commands (see disclaimer) to give yourself the cards without it.

### **13 Card Types**
The types correspond to the nature or behavior of the mobs. Card types are differentiated by the main color of the cards.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Card Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bebdfd74ec9bf04c1458ad04e1326e1d61dd7385.png)

</details>

### **Rarities**
Determine the chance of a card dropping. Each of the five rarities have different card arts.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Rarities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86206af3c5318a4411cb8c3ea08d131ed3aec86a.png)

</details>

### **Editions**
The editions also contribute to the rarity of the cards. These are distinguished by their frames. Apex and Phantom editions on the other hand are full arts so they have no frames.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Editions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/066fa9494fcf709279342f38c48aa89cb1884b2f.png)

</details>

## **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.21.4 to 1.21.11\
_*note: the datapack only supports 1.21.10 version (will update soon)_\
Texture size: 256x

## **DISCLAIMER**
The texture pack is currently in alpha phase. The available cards at the moment are common up to epic cards (first, silver, and gold editions) - When full art and ghost cards are dropped, they will have no texture yet (will appear as black and purple cubes). The drop chances are subject to change. Your feedback is greatly appreciated; you can do so in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/Ff5c4PABud).

The datapack is limited unlike mods. With this, the vanilla paper is used as base item and retextured with the different cards.

You can also obtain the cards via /give command. A sample command is given below. [Here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14d-s1aOcyWMcdosl7REavo4gx9XmfU116cWQVyA0tiQ/edit?usp=sharing) is a database for the available give commands.

```
/give @p minecraft:paper[minecraft:item_model="mobcraft_tcg:1ed_common_allay"]
```

## **ROADMAP**
- Full Art cards (done)
- Ghost cards
- More loot table types (in chests, trades, etc.)
- More card arts
- Fabric Mod

## **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
